flashcards.back:
Formal → Informal

Relation → Table
Tuple → Row
Attribute → Column
Domain → Data Type
Cardinality → # Rows
Degree → # Columns

Select (σ):
- Filters ROWS
- Horizontal cut
- σ_condition(R)
- Example: σ_GPA>3.5(Student)

Project (π):
- Chooses COLUMNS
- Vertical cut
- π_attributes(R)
- Example: π_Name(Student)

Schema:
- Structure definition
- Attribute names & types
- Constraints
- Rarely changes

Instance:
- Actual data (tuples)
- Current state
- Changes with operations

1. Atomic values (single value per cell)
2. No duplicate tuples
3. No tuple ordering
4. No attribute ordering
5. Unique attribute names

Note: Order doesn't matter (sets)

Natural Join (⋈):
- Auto-join on common attributes

Theta Join (⋈_θ):
- Join with any condition

Cartesian Product (×):
- All combinations
- |R| × |S| tuples
